name: Battery Grouper CI

# 1. When should this pipeline run?
on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]

jobs:
  test:
    # 2. What kind of server should it run on?
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    # Step A: Download your code into the runner
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    # Step B: Install Python
    - name: Set up Python 3.10
      uses: actions/setup-python@v5
      with:
        python-version: "3.10" # Change this to match your local Anaconda version if needed

    # Step C: Install the required packages
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install pandas scikit-learn pydantic requests pytest

    # Step D: Execute the tests!
    - name: Run Pytest
      run: |
        pytest tests/ -v
